now.title: What's Happening Now
now.subtitle: View the sessions currently taking place.
now.noSessions: There are no sessions right now.
now.noSessionsNextAt: There are no sessions right now. Next session at {{time}}.

map.title: Floor Map
map.noCurrentSessions: No sessions in this room right now.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Available June 2 only. Proceeds go to the Experts Live Scholarship.

studiebeurs.heading: Experts Live Scholarship — nominate talent
studiebeurs.body1: With every purchase you nominate someone for the €5,000 Experts Live Scholarship: a Microsoft certification package (exams, study material, training) to be used within 12 months.
studiebeurs.body2: More purchases = more nominations. Self-nomination is allowed. The winner is announced via LinkedIn within 30 days after the event.

search.title: Search
search.minChars: Type at least 4 characters to search.

publicTransport.heading: By public transport
publicTransport.intro: From the Nieuwegein Stadscentrum tram stop:

car.heading: By car
car.shuttle: Free shuttle bus every ~15 min between the venue and Sportpark Galecop parking

farewell.heading: On your way out
farewell.body: There's a poffertjes (mini Dutch pancakes) stand at the exit — grab some for the road on us.

questions.title: Questions?
questions.body: Ask one of the volunteers (recognizable by their Experts Live clothing) or visit the registration desk.
questions.emergency: Medical emergency: report at the desk or call 112.
